articles.title: Racist boos to Leao and Maignan: the FIGC prosecutor's office and the referee would not have reported particularly serious situations in their dossiers
articles.summary: Yesterday's match between Hellas Verona and Milan was unfortunately tainted by some racist boos that the fans of the yellow and blue team directed at two Rossoneri players, namely Mike Maignan and Rafael Leao.
